seo.title: Google ADK Guardrails for Education
seo.description: Compliance guide for Google ADK agents in education. Meet FERPA, COPPA requirements with Vex guardrails.

content.intro: Education teams using Google ADK to build multi-agent AI tutoring systems handle highly sensitive student data, making compliance with privacy laws like FERPA and COPPA non-negotiable. Common ADK failure modes such as multi-agent circular dependencies and session state corruption can expose PII or deliver inconsistent, harmful content to minors. Vex provides essential guardrails through before_agent_callback integration to prevent data leaks, ensure age-appropriate outputs, and maintain audit trails for regulatory compliance.

complianceRequirements.description: Protects student education records from unauthorized disclosure, requiring parental consent for minors under 13 and strict access controls.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex scans agent inputs/outputs for PII detection, enforces data minimization, and logs all student interactions for audit trails before agent execution.

complianceRequirements.description: Mandates verifiable parental consent before collecting personal information from children under 13 in online services.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex blocks collection of COPPA-protected data from minors, validates age gates, and redacts identifiable information in multi-agent conversations.

complianceRequirements.description: State-specific laws like California's Student Online Personal Information Protection Act require transparency and prohibit selling student data.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex enforces geofencing for state compliance, prevents data sharing across agents, and generates compliance reports for state audits.

complianceRequirements.description: Requires educational technology to be accessible to users with disabilities, including screen reader compatibility and keyboard navigation.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex validates agent outputs for WCAG 2.1 compliance, ensures alt text generation, and flags inaccessible content before delivery to students.

industryRisks.name: Student PII Exposure via Agent Delegation
industryRisks.description: Multi-agent handoffs in ADK can inadvertently share student IDs or grades across unauthorized agents, violating FERPA.
industryRisks.example: Math tutor agent passes student profile containing SSN to unqualified history agent due to circular delegation.

industryRisks.name: Inappropriate Content to Minors
industryRisks.description: Gemini model switching delivers age-inappropriate or biased responses without content filtering.
industryRisks.example: Language arts agent generates mature themes during reading comprehension for 8th graders.

industryRisks.name: Session State Data Corruption
industryRisks.description: Long tutoring sessions corrupt conversation history, mixing multiple students' data and exposing PII.
industryRisks.example: Student A's medical accommodations appear in Student B's session due to state persistence failure.

industryRisks.name: Tool Format Mismatches
industryRisks.description: Agents misparse tool responses, generating incorrect educational content or privacy violations.
industryRisks.example: Grading tool returns unparsed JSON containing student names, exposed in tutor response.

implementation.title: Install Vex and Configure before_agent_callback
implementation.description: Add Vex as a pre-execution hook to scan all ADK agent inputs for PII and enforce FERPA/COPPA compliance.
implementation.code:
import vex

from google_adk import Agent, Runner

# Initialize Vex client with education policy
vex_client = vex.Client(api_key="your-vex-key")

@vex_client.guardrail(
    policy="education-ferpa-coppa",
    block_on_pii=True,
    age_gate=True,
    audit_trail=True
)
def before_agent_callback(inputs):
    """Vex scans before every ADK agent execution"""
    result = vex_client.evaluate(inputs, context={'industry': 'education'})
    if result.blocked:
        raise ValueError(f"Compliance violation: {result.reason}")
    return inputs

# Apply to ADK Runner
runner = Runner(agents=[tutor_agent], before_agent_callback=before_agent_callback)
runner.run(user_query)

implementation.title: Prevent Multi-Agent PII Leakage
implementation.description: Block circular dependencies and inter-agent PII sharing with Vex workflow validation specific to student data.
implementation.code:
from vex import Guardrail

ferpa_guardrail = Guardrail(
    name="student-data-flow",
    rules=[
        "no_pii_sharing_between_agents",
        "validate_parental_consent",
        "session_isolation"
    ],
    sensitivity="high"
)

@ferpa_guardrail.enforce
async def safe_agent_delegate(sender_inputs, receiver_agent):
    """Safe handoff between ADK agents"""
    # Vex redacts PII before delegation
    cleaned_inputs = vex_client.redact_pii(sender_inputs, categories=['student_id', 'grade'])
    
    # Check for circular dependency
    if vex_client.detects_circular_dependency(cleaned_inputs):
        return "Delegation blocked: circular dependency detected"
    
    return await receiver_agent.execute(cleaned_inputs)

implementation.title: Age-Appropriate Content Filtering
implementation.description: Ensure all Gemini-powered responses are suitable for K-12 students with real-time content moderation.

caseStudyScenario.heading: Google ADK in Education: A Scenario
caseStudyScenario.scenario: Maplewood School District deployed a Google ADK multi-agent tutoring system for 5,000 K-12 students. The system featured specialized agents for math, reading, and behavioral support, powered by Gemini 1.5 Pro with dynamic model switching. Student data including names, grades, IEPs, and progress metrics flowed between agents during 45-minute sessions. Without compliance guardrails, the first week revealed critical failures: the math agent delegated student profiles containing SSNs to the reading agent, session state corruption mixed 8th-grade essays with 3rd-grade math problems, and Gemini model switches produced college-level explanations inappropriate for elementary students. State auditors flagged FERPA violations after discovering unredacted PII in conversation logs.
caseStudyScenario.outcome: After integrating Vex as before_agent_callback, Maplewood achieved 100% compliance. Vex blocked 847 PII leakage attempts, enforced parental consent validation for 2,300 minors, and generated WCAG-compliant outputs. Multi-agent circular dependencies dropped to zero, session corruption was eliminated through state isolation, and all content passed 8th-grade readability checks. The district passed its state audit with perfect scores, avoided $1.2M in potential FERPA fines, and maintained accreditation while scaling to 15,000 students.

cta.heading: Comply with Education Regulations Using Vex
cta.description: Install Vex for Google ADK today and protect your students' data with enterprise-grade compliance guardrails.
